wizard.title: Set up your account
wizard.subtitle: We'll guide you step by step
wizard.skipConfirm: You can complete this later from the dashboard

welcome.title: Welcome to ProfeVision
welcome.description: Let's set up your account in a few minutes. We'll create your first institution, subject, group and students.

students.title: Your students
students.importHint: Upload an Excel file with your students
students.skipWarning: You can add students later, but you'll need at least one to create exams

examOptions.title: Create your first exam
examOptions.description: How do you want to start?

aiOption.title: Create with AI
aiOption.description: Generate questions automatically with artificial intelligence

importOption.title: Import existing
importOption.description: Upload a PDF or Word document with your questions

manualOption.title: Create manually
manualOption.description: Write your own questions from scratch

exploreOption.title: Explore first
exploreOption.description: See the dashboard and create exam later

complete.title: All set!
complete.description: Your account is configured and ready to use

examCreationDrawer.title: Create your first exam
examCreationDrawer.subtitle: Choose how you want to start

import.title: Import exam
import.description: Upload a PDF or Word with your questions. AI will automatically extract questions and options. Mark the correct answer with an asterisk (*) at the end.
import.exampleCaption: Mark the correct answer by adding an asterisk (*) at the end of the option.

ai.title: Generate with AI
ai.description: Describe the topic and AI will generate multiple choice questions. You can upload reference documents for better accuracy.

checklist.title: Getting Started
checklist.subtitle: Complete these steps to get the most out of ProfeVision
checklist.dismissConfirm: You can access this guide from your profile

createExam.title: Create your first exam
createExam.description: Use AI, import or create manually

publishExam.title: Publish the exam
publishExam.description: Finalize the exam to print and grade. Click 'Publish' in the exam options.
